revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:BaseConvert}} === Usage === *{{hex2dec|0x0000}} → {{hex2dec|0x0000}} *{{hex2dec|0xA0}} → {{hex2dec|0xA0}} *{{hex2dec|0x7C0}} → {{hex2dec|0x7C0}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} *{{hex2dec|0x845FED}} → {{hex2dec|0x845FED}} *{{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} → {{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} *{{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} → {{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} ;Input formats Input with or without '''0x''' prefix: *{{hex2dec|0xa0}} → {{hex2dec|0xa0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|a0}} Uppercase and lowercase accepted: *{{hex2dec|A0}} → {{hex2dec|0x00A0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|A0}} ;Not a number input *{{hex2dec|}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec}} → {{hex2dec}} *{{hex2dec|0xAXYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|XYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|0xA B}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|A B}} → {{hex2dec|}} === See also === * {{tl|h2d}} (redirect) * {{tl|hexadecimal}} {{Math templates|numeral systems}}{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Numerical conversion templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:BaseConvert}} === Usage === *{{hex2dec|0x0000}} → {{hex2dec|0x0000}} *{{hex2dec|0xA0}} → {{hex2dec|0xA0}} *{{hex2dec|0x7C0}} → {{hex2dec|0x7C0}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} *{{hex2dec|0x845FED}} → {{hex2dec|0x845FED}} *{{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} → {{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} *{{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} → {{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} ;Input formats Input with or without '''0x''' prefix: *{{hex2dec|0xa0}} → {{hex2dec|0xa0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|a0}} Uppercase and lowercase accepted: *{{hex2dec|A0}} → {{hex2dec|0x00A0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|A0}} ;Not a number input *{{hex2dec|}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec}} → {{hex2dec}} *{{hex2dec|0xAXYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|XYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|0xA B}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|A B}} → {{hex2dec|}} === See also === * {{tl|h2d}} (redirect) * {{tl|hexadecimal}} {{Math templates|numeral systems}}{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Numerical conversion templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:BaseConvert}} === Usage === *{{hex2dec|0x0000}} → {{hex2dec|0x0000}} *{{hex2dec|0xA0}} → {{hex2dec|0xA0}} *{{hex2dec|0x7C0}} → {{hex2dec|0x7C0}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} *{{hex2dec|0x845FED}} → {{hex2dec|0x845FED}} *{{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} → {{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} *{{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} → {{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} ;Input formats Input with or without '''0x''' prefix: *{{hex2dec|0xa0}} → {{hex2dec|0xa0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|a0}} Uppercase and lowercase accepted: *{{hex2dec|A0}} → {{hex2dec|0x00A0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|A0}} ;Not a number input *{{hex2dec|}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec}} → {{hex2dec}} *{{hex2dec|0xAXYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|XYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|0xA B}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|A B}} → {{hex2dec|}} === See also === * {{tl|h2d}} (redirect) * {{tl|hexadecimal}} {{Math templates|numeral systems}}{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Numerical conversion templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:BaseConvert}} === Usage === *{{hex2dec|0x0000}} → {{hex2dec|0x0000}} *{{hex2dec|0xA0}} → {{hex2dec|0xA0}} *{{hex2dec|0x7C0}} → {{hex2dec|0x7C0}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} *{{hex2dec|0x845FED}} → {{hex2dec|0x845FED}} *{{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} → {{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} *{{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} → {{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} ;Input formats Input with or without '''0x''' prefix: *{{hex2dec|0xa0}} → {{hex2dec|0xa0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|a0}} Uppercase and lowercase accepted: *{{hex2dec|A0}} → {{hex2dec|0x00A0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|A0}} ;Not a number input *{{hex2dec|}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec}} → {{hex2dec}} *{{hex2dec|0xAXYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|XYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|0xA B}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|A B}} → {{hex2dec|}} === See also === * {{tl|h2d}} (redirect) * {{tl|hexadecimal}} {{Math templates|numeral systems}}{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Numerical conversion templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:BaseConvert}} === Usage === *{{hex2dec|0x0000}} → {{hex2dec|0x0000}} *{{hex2dec|0xA0}} → {{hex2dec|0xA0}} *{{hex2dec|0x7C0}} → {{hex2dec|0x7C0}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} *{{hex2dec|0x845FED}} → {{hex2dec|0x845FED}} *{{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} → {{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} *{{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} → {{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} ;Input formats Input with or without '''0x''' prefix: *{{hex2dec|0xa0}} → {{hex2dec|0xa0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|a0}} Uppercase and lowercase accepted: *{{hex2dec|A0}} → {{hex2dec|0x00A0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|A0}} ;Not a number input *{{hex2dec|}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec}} → {{hex2dec}} *{{hex2dec|0xAXYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|XYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|0xA B}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|A B}} → {{hex2dec|}} === See also === * {{tl|h2d}} (redirect) * {{tl|hexadecimal}} {{Math templates|numeral systems}}{{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Numerical conversion templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hex2dec%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:BaseConvert}} === Usage === *{{hex2dec|0x0000}} → {{hex2dec|0x0000}} *{{hex2dec|0xA0}} → {{hex2dec|0xA0}} *{{hex2dec|0x7C0}} → {{hex2dec|0x7C0}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFF}} *{{hex2dec|0x845FED}} → {{hex2dec|0x845FED}} *{{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} → {{hex2dec|0x75BCD15}} *{{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} → {{hex2dec|0xDEADBEEF}} *{{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} → {{hex2dec|0xFFFFFFFF}} ;Input formats Input with or without '''0x''' prefix: *{{hex2dec|0xa0}} → {{hex2dec|0xa0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|a0}} Uppercase and lowercase accepted: *{{hex2dec|A0}} → {{hex2dec|0x00A0}} *{{hex2dec|a0}} → {{hex2dec|A0}} ;Not a number input *{{hex2dec|}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec}} → {{hex2dec}} *{{hex2dec|0xAXYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|XYZ}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|0xA B}} → {{hex2dec|}} *{{hex2dec|A B}} → {{hex2dec|}} === See also === * {{tl|h2d}} (redirect) * {{tl|hexadecimal}} {{Math templates|numeral systems}}{{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Numerical conversion templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
